1.text: Mosaic attenuation pattern in lung parenchyma bilaterally

2.text: Linear atelectasis in the lingular segment of the left lung

3.text: Bronchiectasis in the lower lobe bronchi of the left lung

4.text: Subpleural fibrotic changes in the left lung

5.text: 7x6 mm nodule in the lateral aspect of the left lower lobe

6.text: 5 mm nodule with irregular margins in the apical segment of the upper lobe of the right lung
